title: Cross-Device Flow
description: View end-to-end flows across sender and receiver devices

example.description: Find all events for a cross-device flow using origin_flow_id

example_descriptions: Track clipboard content from sender to receiver
Identify where delays occur in cross-device sync

field_mapping.flow_id: Current device's flow_id for this clipboard operation
field_mapping.origin_flow_id: Original sender's flow_id (preserved through the sync pipeline)
field_mapping.origin_device_id: Original device that captured the clipboard content
